Tossing a coin: Preferences for random allocation in triage decisions

Versions

R version 4.4.1 (2024-06-14) Platform: aarch64-apple-darwin20 Running under: macOS Sonoma 14.6

Matrix products: default BLAS: /System/Library/Frameworks/Accelerate.framework/Versions/A/Frameworks/vecLib.framework/Versions/A/libBLAS.dylib LAPACK: /Library/Frameworks/R.framework/Versions/4.4-arm64/Resources/lib/libRlapack.dylib; LAPACK version 3.12.0

library(ggthemes)

Data preparation

data <- 
  readRDS(file = "data/df_triage_final.rds") %>% 
  filter(bot_all & time >= 5)

Figures

Figure 1

data %>% 
  select("id", 
         "vig_set", 
         "vig_choice"
         ) %>% 
  group_by(id, vig_set) %>%
  mutate(random = if_else(condition = any(vig_choice == 3),
                          true = 1,
                          false = 0
                          )
         ) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(-"vig_choice") %>%
  unique() %>% 
  group_by(id) %>%
  summarise(sum_random = sum(random)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  count(sum_random) %>% 
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = sum_random,
                       y = prop
                       )
         ) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1)) +
  geom_text(mapping = aes(label = scales::percent(prop)),
            vjust = -0.5,
            family = "serif"
            ) +
  labs(x = "Number of allocations by random lottery",
       y = "Proportion of participants"
       ) +
  theme_clean() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 12,
                            family = "serif"
                            ),
        plot.background = element_blank()
        )

Figure 2

data %>% 
  select("id", 
         contains("vig_")
         ) %>% 
  filter(vig_choice != 3) %>% 
  lmer(formula = vig_choice ~ vig_weight + 
                              vig_age + 
                              vig_chance_of_survival_with_ventilation +
                              vig_ventilation_status + 
                              vig_children +
                              vig_disability + 
                              vig_volunteer_work + 
                              vig_vaccination_status + 
                              (1|id),
       data = .
       ) %>% 
  confint(.,
          method = "Wald"
          ) %>%
  as_tibble(.,
            rownames = "eff"
            ) %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  mutate(effect = NA) %>%
  add_case(eff = c("20% chance of survival (Ref.)", "25 years old (Ref.)"),
           effect = 0,
           x97_5_percent = NA,
           x2_5_percent = NA
           ) %>% 
  transmute(x2_5_percent,
            x97_5_percent,
            effect = if_else(condition = is.na(effect),
                             true = .$x2_5_percent + (.$x97_5_percent - .$x2_5_percent) / 2,
                             false = effect
                             ),
            attr = str_extract(eff, 
                            "[A-Z0-9].*"
                            ),
            attr = factor(attr,
                          levels = c("20% chance of survival (Ref.)",
                                     "50% chance of survival",
                                     "80% chance of survival",
                                     "25 years old (Ref.)",
                                     "50 years old",
                                     "75 years old",
                                     "Has a disability",
                                     "Overweight",
                                     "Is already ventilated",
                                     "Is vaccinated",
                                     "Does volunteer work",
                                     "Has children"
                                     ),
                          labels = c("20% chance of survival (Ref.)",
                                     "50% chance of survival",
                                     "80% chance of survival",
                                     "25 years old (Ref.)",
                                     "50 years old",
                                     "75 years old",
                                     "Has a disability",
                                     "Is overweight",
                                     "Is already ventilated",
                                     "Is vaccinated",
                                     "Does volunteer work",
                                     "Has children"
                                     )
                          ),
            attr = fct_rev(attr)
            ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(attr)) %>%
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = attr, 
                       y = effect
                       )
         ) +
   geom_hline(yintercept = 0,
              linetype = "dashed"
              ) +
  geom_errorbar(mapping = aes(ymin = x2_5_percent,
                              ymax = x97_5_percent
                              ),
                width = 0.25
                ) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "AMCE",
       color = "Condition",
       shape = "Condition"
       ) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_clean() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 12,
                            family = "serif"
                            ),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 9,
                                    family = "serif"
                                    ),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9,
                                   family = "serif"
                                   ),
        plot.background = element_blank()
        )
boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')

Regression table

data %>% 
  filter(vig_choice != 3) %>% 
  lmer(formula = vig_choice ~ vig_weight + 
                              vig_age + 
                              vig_chance_of_survival_with_ventilation +
                              vig_ventilation_status + 
                              vig_children +
                              vig_disability + 
                              vig_volunteer_work + 
                              vig_vaccination_status + 
                              (1|id),
       data = .
       ) %>% 
  summary()
boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method ['lmerModLmerTest']
Formula: vig_choice ~ vig_weight + vig_age + vig_chance_of_survival_with_ventilation +  
    vig_ventilation_status + vig_children + vig_disability +  
    vig_volunteer_work + vig_vaccination_status + (1 | id)
   Data: .

REML criterion at convergence: 19550.8

Scaled residuals: 
     Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
-1.97241 -0.92462  0.04195  0.90736  2.05631 

Random effects:
 Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
 id       (Intercept) 0.0000   0.000   
 Residual             0.2125   0.461   
Number of obs: 15106, groups:  id, 1905

Fixed effects:
                                                                Estimate Std. Error         df t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept)                                                    4.029e-01  1.245e-02  1.510e+04  32.351  < 2e-16 ***
vig_weightOverweight                                          -2.242e-02  7.505e-03  1.510e+04  -2.987  0.00282 ** 
vig_age50 years old                                           -1.342e-01  9.170e-03  1.510e+04 -14.633  < 2e-16 ***
vig_age75 years old                                           -3.121e-01  9.190e-03  1.510e+04 -33.956  < 2e-16 ***
vig_chance_of_survival_with_ventilation50% chance of survival  1.817e-01  9.242e-03  1.510e+04  19.665  < 2e-16 ***
vig_chance_of_survival_with_ventilation80% chance of survival  3.121e-01  9.173e-03  1.510e+04  34.028  < 2e-16 ***
vig_ventilation_statusIs already ventilated                    9.194e-03  7.503e-03  1.510e+04   1.225  0.22048    
vig_childrenHas children                                       9.172e-02  7.504e-03  1.510e+04  12.222  < 2e-16 ***
vig_disabilityHas a disability                                -1.636e-02  7.503e-03  1.510e+04  -2.181  0.02923 *  
vig_volunteer_workDoes volunteer work                          1.410e-02  7.504e-03  1.510e+04   1.879  0.06024 .  
vig_vaccination_statusIs vaccinated                            7.925e-02  7.504e-03  1.510e+04  10.561  < 2e-16 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

Correlation of Fixed Effects:
            (Intr) vg_wgO v_50yo v_75yo v_____5cos v_____8cos v__Iav vg_cHc vg_Had v__Dvw
vg_wghtOvrw -0.300                                                                       
vg_g50yrsol -0.377  0.010                                                                
vg_g75yrsol -0.374 -0.010  0.496                                                         
v_____50cos -0.377  0.003  0.003  0.008                                                  
v_____80cos -0.372 -0.010  0.008  0.019  0.505                                           
vg_vntl_Iav -0.300  0.010  0.003  0.009  0.003     -0.008                                
vg_chldrnHc -0.295 -0.002  0.013  0.011 -0.015     -0.009      0.003                     
vg_dsbltHad -0.293 -0.003 -0.002 -0.011  0.003     -0.004     -0.002 -0.009              
vg_vlnt_Dvw -0.301 -0.007  0.006  0.014  0.010      0.009     -0.009 -0.007 -0.005       
vg_vccnt_Iv -0.305  0.010 -0.004 -0.008  0.003     -0.009     -0.004 -0.007  0.006  0.003

boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')

Figure 3

data %>% 
  select("id", 
         contains("vig_")
         ) %>% 
  group_by(id, 
           vig_set
           ) %>% 
  transmute(id,
            vig_set,
            random = if_else(any(vig_choice == 3),
                          true = 1,
                          false = 0
                          ),
         same_survival = if_else(length(unique(vig_chance_of_survival_with_ventilation)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 ),
         same_age = if_else(length(unique(vig_age)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 ),
         same_vaccination = if_else(length(unique(vig_vaccination_status)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 ),
         same_volunteer = if_else(length(unique(vig_volunteer_work)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 ),
         same_disability = if_else(length(unique(vig_disability)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 ),
         same_children = if_else(length(unique(vig_children)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 ),
         same_ventilation = if_else(length(unique(vig_ventilation_status)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 ),
         same_weight = if_else(length(unique(vig_weight)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 )
         ) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
  distinct() %$%
  clogit(formula = random ~ same_survival + 
                            same_age + 
                            same_disability + 
                            same_weight + 
                            same_ventilation + 
                            same_vaccination + 
                            same_volunteer + 
                            same_children + 
                            strata(id)
         ) %>% 
  confint(., 
          method = "Wald"
          ) %>%
  as_tibble(.,
            rownames = "variable"
            ) %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  mutate(coef = x2_5_percent + (x97_5_percent - x2_5_percent) / 2,
         variable = factor(variable,
                           levels = c("same_survival",
                                      "same_age",
                                      "same_disability",
                                      "same_weight",
                                      "same_ventilation",
                                      "same_vaccination",
                                      "same_volunteer",
                                      "same_children"),
                           labels = c("Chance of survival is equal",
                                      "Age is equal",
                                      "Disability is equal",
                                      "Overweight is equal",
                                      "Ventilation status is equal",
                                      "Vaccination status is equal",
                                      "Volunteer work is equal",
                                      "Children is equal")
                           ),
         variable = fct_rev(variable),
         coef = exp(coef),
         x2_5_percent = exp(x2_5_percent),
         x97_5_percent = exp(x97_5_percent)
         ) %>% 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = coef,
                       y = variable
                       )
         ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1,
             linetype = "dashed"
             ) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(mapping = aes(xmin = x2_5_percent,
                              xmax = x97_5_percent),
                width = 0.25
                ) +
  labs(x = "OR",
       y = "",
       ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(from = 1, 
                                  to = 2.5, 
                                  by = 0.5)) +
  theme_clean() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 12,
                            family = "serif"
                            ),
        plot.background = element_blank()
        )

Regression table

data %>% 
  select("id", 
         contains("vig_")
         ) %>% 
  group_by(id, 
           vig_set
           ) %>% 
  transmute(id,
            vig_set,
            random = if_else(any(vig_choice == 3),
                          true = 1,
                          false = 0
                          ),
            same_survival = if_else(length(unique(vig_chance_of_survival_with_ventilation)) == 1,
                                    true = 1,
                                    false = 0
                                    ),
            same_age = if_else(length(unique(vig_age)) == 1,
                               true = 1,
                               false = 0
                               ),
            same_vaccination = if_else(length(unique(vig_vaccination_status)) == 1,
                                       true = 1,
                                       false = 0
                                       ),
            same_volunteer = if_else(length(unique(vig_volunteer_work)) == 1,
                                     true = 1,
                                     false = 0
                                     ),
            same_disability = if_else(length(unique(vig_disability)) == 1,
                                      true = 1,
                                      false = 0
                                      ),
            same_children = if_else(length(unique(vig_children)) == 1,
                                    true = 1,
                                    false = 0
                                    ),
            same_ventilation = if_else(length(unique(vig_ventilation_status)) == 1,
                                       true = 1,
                                       false = 0
                                       ),
            same_weight = if_else(length(unique(vig_weight)) == 1,
                                  true = 1,
                                  false = 0
                                  )
            ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  distinct() %$%
  clogit(formula = random ~ same_survival + 
                            same_age + 
                            same_disability + 
                            same_weight + 
                            same_ventilation + 
                            same_vaccination + 
                            same_volunteer + 
                            same_children + 
                            strata(id)
         ) %>% 
  summary()
Call:
coxph(formula = Surv(rep(1, 9990L), random) ~ same_survival + 
    same_age + same_disability + same_weight + same_ventilation + 
    same_vaccination + same_volunteer + same_children + strata(id), 
    method = "exact")

  n= 9990, number of events= 2437 

                     coef exp(coef) se(coef)      z Pr(>|z|)    
same_survival    0.854023  2.349078 0.064008 13.342  < 2e-16 ***
same_age         0.461926  1.587128 0.064077  7.209 5.64e-13 ***
same_disability  0.003633  1.003639 0.062132  0.058  0.95338    
same_weight      0.048374  1.049563 0.062131  0.779  0.43623    
same_ventilation 0.161513  1.175288 0.062010  2.605  0.00920 ** 
same_vaccination 0.317573  1.373790 0.062305  5.097 3.45e-07 ***
same_volunteer   0.005771  1.005788 0.062256  0.093  0.92614    
same_children    0.188820  1.207824 0.061762  3.057  0.00223 ** 
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

                 exp(coef) exp(-coef) lower .95 upper .95
same_survival        2.349     0.4257    2.0721     2.663
same_age             1.587     0.6301    1.3998     1.800
same_disability      1.004     0.9964    0.8886     1.134
same_weight          1.050     0.9528    0.9292     1.185
same_ventilation     1.175     0.8509    1.0408     1.327
same_vaccination     1.374     0.7279    1.2159     1.552
same_volunteer       1.006     0.9942    0.8903     1.136
same_children        1.208     0.8279    1.0701     1.363

Concordance= 0.627  (se = 0.012 )
Likelihood ratio test= 278  on 8 df,   p=<2e-16
Wald test            = 259.8  on 8 df,   p=<2e-16
Score (logrank) test = 275.8  on 8 df,   p=<2e-16

Figure 4

data %>% 
  select("id", 
         contains("vig_"), 
         "fairness_random"
         ) %>% 
  group_by(id, 
           vig_set
           ) %>% 
  transmute(id,
            vig_set,
            random = if_else(any(vig_choice == 3),
                             true = 1,
                             false = 0
                             ),
            fairness_random,
            same_survival = if_else(length(unique(vig_chance_of_survival_with_ventilation)) == 1,
                                    true = 1,
                                    false = 0
                                    ),
            same_age = if_else(length(unique(vig_age)) == 1,
                                      true = 1,
                                      false = 0
                               ),
            same_vaccination = if_else(length(unique(vig_vaccination_status)) == 1,
                                       true = 1,
                                       false = 0
                                       ),
            same_volunteer = if_else(length(unique(vig_volunteer_work)) == 1,
                                     true = 1,
                                     false = 0
                                     ),
            same_disability = if_else(length(unique(vig_disability)) == 1,
                                      true = 1,
                                      false = 0
                                      ),
            same_children = if_else(length(unique(vig_children)) == 1,
                                    true = 1,
                                    false = 0
                                    ),
            same_ventilation = if_else(length(unique(vig_ventilation_status)) == 1,
                                       true = 1,
                                       false = 0
                                       ),
            same_weight = if_else(length(unique(vig_weight)) == 1,
                                  true = 1,
                                  false = 0
                                  )
            ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  filter(as.logical(random)) %$%
  lmer(fairness_random ~ same_survival + 
                         same_age + 
                         same_vaccination + 
                         same_volunteer + 
                         same_disability + 
                         same_children + 
                         same_ventilation + 
                         same_weight + 
         (1|id)
       ) %>%
  confint(., 
          method = "Wald"
          ) %>%
  as_tibble(.,
            rownames = "variable"
            ) %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  mutate(coef = x2_5_percent + (x97_5_percent - x2_5_percent) / 2,
         variable = factor(variable,
                           levels = c("same_survival",
                                      "same_age",
                                      "same_disability",
                                      "same_weight",
                                      "same_ventilation",
                                      "same_vaccination",
                                      "same_volunteer",
                                      "same_children"),
                           labels = c("Chance of survival is equal",
                                      "Age is equal",
                                      "Disability is equal",
                                      "Overweight is equal",
                                      "Ventilation status is equal",
                                      "Vaccination status is equal",
                                      "Volunteer work is equal",
                                      "Children is equal")
                           ),
         variable = fct_rev(variable)
         ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(variable)) %>% 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = coef,
                       y = variable
                       )
         ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0,
             linetype = "dashed"
             ) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(mapping = aes(xmin = x2_5_percent,
                              xmax = x97_5_percent
                              ),
                width = 0.25
                ) +
  labs(x = "Coefficients (OLS)",
       y = "",
       ) +
  theme_clean() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 12,
                            family = "serif"
                            ),
        plot.background = element_blank()
        )

Regression table

data %>% 
  select("id", 
         contains("vig_"), 
         "fairness_random"
         ) %>% 
  group_by(id, 
           vig_set
           ) %>% 
  transmute(id,
            vig_set,
            random = if_else(any(vig_choice == 3),
                             true = 1,
                             false = 0
                             ),
            fairness_random,
            same_survival = if_else(length(unique(vig_chance_of_survival_with_ventilation)) == 1,
                                    true = 1,
                                    false = 0
                                    ),
            same_age = if_else(length(unique(vig_age)) == 1,
                                      true = 1,
                                      false = 0
                               ),
            same_vaccination = if_else(length(unique(vig_vaccination_status)) == 1,
                                       true = 1,
                                       false = 0
                                       ),
            same_volunteer = if_else(length(unique(vig_volunteer_work)) == 1,
                                     true = 1,
                                     false = 0
                                     ),
            same_disability = if_else(length(unique(vig_disability)) == 1,
                                      true = 1,
                                      false = 0
                                      ),
            same_children = if_else(length(unique(vig_children)) == 1,
                                    true = 1,
                                    false = 0
                                    ),
            same_ventilation = if_else(length(unique(vig_ventilation_status)) == 1,
                                       true = 1,
                                       false = 0
                                       ),
            same_weight = if_else(length(unique(vig_weight)) == 1,
                                  true = 1,
                                  false = 0
                                  )
            ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  filter(as.logical(random)) %$%
  lmer(fairness_random ~ same_survival + 
                         same_age + 
                         same_vaccination + 
                         same_volunteer + 
                         same_disability + 
                         same_children + 
                         same_ventilation + 
                         same_weight + 
         (1|id)
       ) %>% 
  summary()
Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method ['lmerModLmerTest']
Formula: fairness_random ~ same_survival + same_age + same_vaccination +  
    same_volunteer + same_disability + same_children + same_ventilation +      same_weight + (1 | id)

REML criterion at convergence: 7796.5

Scaled residuals: 
    Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
-3.7367 -0.4433  0.0385  0.5155  2.4214 

Random effects:
 Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
 id       (Intercept) 0.6378   0.7986  
 Residual             0.9484   0.9739  
Number of obs: 2437, groups:  id, 1231

Fixed effects:
                   Estimate Std. Error         df t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept)         3.88348    0.07161 2418.96648  54.230  < 2e-16 ***
same_survival       0.18986    0.04832 2304.81588   3.929 8.77e-05 ***
same_age            0.23487    0.04788 2183.34022   4.906 9.99e-07 ***
same_vaccination    0.09549    0.04685 2181.94690   2.038   0.0416 *  
same_volunteer      0.01568    0.04625 2154.19449   0.339   0.7346    
same_disability    -0.01660    0.04635 2152.90465  -0.358   0.7203    
same_children       0.09030    0.04604 2128.86302   1.961   0.0500 *  
same_ventilation    0.05519    0.04663 2175.06908   1.183   0.2368    
same_weight         0.02131    0.04606 2133.40544   0.463   0.6437    
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

Correlation of Fixed Effects:
            (Intr) sm_srv same_g sm_vcc sm_vln sm_dsb sm_chl sm_vnt
same_survvl -0.274                                                 
same_age    -0.238 -0.034                                          
same_vccntn -0.348 -0.022  0.004                                   
same_volntr -0.335  0.001  0.012 -0.002                            
same_dsblty -0.312 -0.015 -0.031 -0.002 -0.011                     
same_chldrn -0.323  0.003 -0.035 -0.022 -0.001  0.031              
same_vntltn -0.336 -0.052  0.015 -0.030 -0.013  0.042  0.018       
same_weight -0.320  0.011 -0.018  0.035  0.040 -0.048 -0.033  0.004

Figure A4

Regression table (CLMM)

data %>% 
  dplyr::select("id", contains("vig_"), "fairness_random") %>% 
  group_by(id, vig_set) %>% 
  transmute(id,
            vig_set,
            random = if_else(any(vig_choice == 3),
                          true = 1,
                          false = 0
                          ),
            fairness_random = factor(fairness_random,
                                     levels = 1:6,
                                     ordered = TRUE),
         same_survival = if_else(length(unique(vig_chance_of_survival_with_ventilation)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 ),
         same_age = if_else(length(unique(vig_age)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 ),
         same_vaccination = if_else(length(unique(vig_vaccination_status)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 ),
         same_volunteer = if_else(length(unique(vig_volunteer_work)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 ),
         same_disability = if_else(length(unique(vig_disability)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 ),
         same_children = if_else(length(unique(vig_children)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 ),
         same_ventilation = if_else(length(unique(vig_ventilation_status)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 ),
         same_weight = if_else(length(unique(vig_weight)) == 1,
                                 true = 1,
                                 false = 0
                                 )
         ) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  filter(as.logical(random)) %$%
  clmm(fairness_random ~ same_survival + same_age + same_vaccination + same_volunteer + same_disability + same_children + same_ventilation + same_weight + (1|id),
       data = .,
       link = "logit"
       ) %>% 
  summary()

Cumulative Link Mixed Model fitted with the Laplace approximation

formula: fairness_random ~ same_survival + same_age + same_vaccination +  
    same_volunteer + same_disability + same_children + same_ventilation +      same_weight + (1 | id)
data:    .

 Groups Name        Variance Std.Dev.

                 Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)

same_age          0.47644    0.09612   4.957 7.17e-07 ***
same_vaccination  0.21445    0.09318   2.302 0.021363 *  
same_volunteer    0.02895    0.09185   0.315 0.752570    
same_disability   0.01536    0.09226   0.166 0.867779    
same_children     0.20257    0.09186   2.205 0.027437 *  
same_ventilation  0.10407    0.09276   1.122 0.261917    
same_weight       0.02816    0.09189   0.306 0.759247
